name: Security State Bank Of Oklee
description_short: Community bank serving Oklee, MN since 1937, offering traditional banking services including checking, savings, mortgages, agricultural loans, and local insurance.
description_long:
Security State Bank of Oklee is a locally-owned community bank with deep roots in rural Minnesota, having served the Oklee area for over 85 years since its founding in 1937. The institution operates a single branch location at 201 Main Street in Oklee, MN, and maintains an active online banking platform for digital account access and management.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of financial services tailored to both personal and business customers. Core offerings include checking and savings accounts, ATM access through their locator network, debit cards, and online banking enrollment. The bank specializes in mortgage lending for home purchases and refinancing, agricultural loans designed for the farming community they serve, and operates an affiliated independent insurance agency licensed in Minnesota. They also provide financial calculators and FAQs to help customers understand their banking options.

Security State Bank distinguishes itself through deep community integration and specialization in agricultural lending, reflecting the rural economy of their service area. The bank emphasizes personalized service with extended Thursday hours (8:30 am – 6:00 pm) and positions itself as a "trusted local partner." Their co-location with an insurance agency provides convenience for customers seeking both banking and insurance products under one roof.

As a single-location community bank, Security State Bank serves a niche market of local depositors and borrowers with specific agricultural and residential financing needs. The limited branch footprint and geographic focus mean this institution is not suitable for customers requiring multi-state banking convenience or extensive branch networks, but appeals strongly to those valuing local decision-making and community-focused service. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online banking platform with login access
Mortgage loans for home purchase and refinancing
Secured email communication for account questions
pros: Established 1937 with 85+ years of community banking history and trust in Oklee
Specialized agricultural lending expertise designed for farming operations in the area
Extended Thursday hours (8:30 am – 6:00 pm) accommodating working customers
Co-located independent insurance agency for bundled banking and insurance services
Online banking and secured email communication for account management
Personalized mortgage services for home purchases and refinancing
Local decision-making authority typical of community banks versus corporate branches
cons: Single branch location limits convenience for customers outside Oklee area
No mention of mobile banking app availability on website
Limited information about deposit insurance, account types, or competitive interest rates
No discussion of business account features, merchant services, or SBA lending programs
Email contact form explicitly warns against sending sensitive information, requiring phone/mail instead
best_for: Farmers and agricultural operations requiring specialized lending in rural Minnesota
Oklee residents seeking personalized, local banking relationships and community commitment
Home buyers in the region interested in mortgage services from a local lender
Small business owners in the Oklee area needing relationship-based financing
diagnosis: Security State Bank of Oklee is best for rural Minnesota residents and farmers seeking community-focused banking with agricultural lending expertise and personalized service. The main caveat is the single-branch limitation and lack of digital convenience features that customers accustomed to large regional or national banks may expect.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Community bank in Oklee, MN since 1937 offering checking, savings, mortgages, agricultural loans, and local insurance.
